overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a rainy urban residential neighborhood at night. The character walks along a wet sidewalk past apartment buildings, waits for a white sedan to pass at an intersection, then crosses the street with neon and streetlight reflections visible on the wet pavement.

events.description: group of pedestrians ahead disperses and moves out of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk, gradually moving out of frame

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with illuminated windows and balconies
vehicles parked along the curb including a black SUV
blue postal mailbox on the sidewalk
palm trees lining the left side of the street
wall-mounted signs and posters on the building entrance

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet residential sidewalk at night during heavy rain. A group of pedestrians walks ahead in the same direction, while apartment buildings with glowing windows line the right side and palm trees line the left. Streetlights reflect off the wet pavement.

events.description: white sedan approaches from the left side of the intersection
white sedan drives past the camera from left to right

agents.ego_description: pausing at the curb to allow the white sedan to pass before crossing the street

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving across the intersection from left to right with headlights on

entered.detail: white four-door sedan with headlights illuminated driving through the intersection
back of a diamond-shaped traffic sign on a pole

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street corner at night with heavy rain falling. The camera pauses as a white sedan drives past the intersection from left to right. The blue mailbox is now on the left side having been passed, and the apartment building recedes into the background.

events.description: steps off the sidewalk curb onto the wet asphalt street surface

agents.ego_description: walking across the wide wet intersection toward the opposite sidewalk

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance down the street
tall palm trees lining the far side of the intersection
red traffic light visible at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide wet intersection with rain continuing to fall. The asphalt reflects streetlights and building lights. The apartment building is now on the left side, and distant illuminated skyscrapers become visible ahead. Palm trees line the opposite corner of the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a rain-slicked residential neighborhood that gradually opens up toward a distant city skyline. It begins by moving along a wet sidewalk beneath glowing streetlights, passing palm trees and apartment buildings with illuminated windows while following a group of pedestrians. As the camera reaches a street corner, the forward motion pauses to let a white sedan drive across the intersection, leaving a blue mailbox behind as the residential buildings begin to recede. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the wide, shimmering asphalt of the intersection, where the reflections of neon and streetlights intensify on the wet ground. Finally, the view expands past the opposite corner's palm trees to reveal illuminated skyscrapers emerging in the distance through the heavy rain.
